purpose: Find large Gaia-aligned galaxy and QSO catalogs and literature about extragalactic classification in nearby-galaxy fields.

queries.query: (title:"Gaia" OR abstract:"Gaia") AND (title:(galaxy OR quasar OR extragalactic) OR abstract:(galaxy OR quasar OR extragalactic)) AND (title:(catalog OR catalogue) OR abstract:(catalog OR catalogue)) AND year:[2018 TO 2026]
(title:"Gaia" OR abstract:"Gaia") AND (title:galaxies OR title:galaxy) AND (abstract:(classification OR catalog OR catalogue OR morphology)) AND year:[2018 TO 2026]
title:(Gaia AND (quasar OR extragalactic OR "galaxy candidates" OR "galaxy catalog" OR "galaxy catalogue")) year:[2018 TO 2026]

(title:Gaia OR abstract:Gaia) AND (title:WISE OR abstract:WISE OR title:unWISE OR abstract:unWISE OR title:CatWISE OR abstract:CatWISE) AND (title:(quasar OR AGN OR extragalactic OR galaxy) OR abstract:(quasar OR AGN OR extragalactic OR galaxy)) year:[2018 TO 2026]

screening_scope: Targeted relevance review of the user-supplied works, the Gaia DR3 extragalactic paper's citation set, and title or abstract matches. This is not a claim that every broad-query result was read.

key_results.title: Gaia Data Release 3. The extragalactic content
key_results.disposition: Primary definition and purity/completeness reference for Gaia DR3 integrated galaxy and QSO candidate tables.

key_results.title: Gaia Data Release 3. Surface brightness profiles of galaxies and host galaxies of quasars
key_results.disposition: Primary reference for the selected 914837-source Gaia morphology stress catalog.

key_results.title: Quaia, the Gaia-unWISE Quasar Catalog: An All-sky Spectroscopic Quasar Sample
key_results.disposition: Selected all-sky QSO spatial-null catalog because a matching selection function is published.

key_results.title: CatNorth: An Improved Gaia DR3 Quasar Candidate Catalog with Pan-STARRS1 and CatWISE
key_results.disposition: Relevant northern sensitivity catalog; not selected as the primary all-sky null.

key_results.title: The CatSouth Quasar Candidate Catalog for the Southern Sky and a Unified All-sky Catalog Based on Gaia DR3
key_results.disposition: New all-sky CatGlobe comparison discovered in the search; defer download until Quaia is tested.

key_results.title: The Gaia-unWISE AGN Catalog
key_results.disposition: Important Gaia DR1 historical reference; not primary for a Gaia DR3 selector.

key_results.title: Comparing Gaia, NED, and SIMBAD source classifications in nearby galaxies
key_results.disposition: Critical evidence that all-sky Gaia class labels behave differently in nearby-galaxy fields.

key_results.title: Gaia DR3 and nearby galaxies: where do foregrounds matter?
key_results.disposition: Critical reference for radial and magnitude dependence in Gaia source populations toward nearby galaxies.

key_results.title: Quasar and galaxy classification using Gaia EDR3 and CatWise2020
key_results.disposition: Method reference demonstrating the importance of population priors and Gaia plus CatWISE features.

key_results.title: LQAC-6: Sixth Release of the Large Quasar Astrometric Catalogue
key_results.disposition: Potential heterogeneous bona fide QSO sensitivity reference with 1739187 Gaia DR3 counterparts.

key_results.title: Performance analysis of extragalactic classifications in Gaia Data Release 4
key_results.disposition: Methods reference only; not treated as a released DR4 catalog input.
